common.ctaHeading: Ready for the right next step?
common.ctaBody: Send us a message and we'll help you get started.

spanish.title: Florida driving help in Spanish
spanish.subtitle: From your first permit to handling a ticket, we explain Florida's steps in Spanish and support you over WhatsApp. Educational guidance and approved-provider connections — no outcome is guaranteed.

permit.title: Prepare for the Florida permit exam with confidence
permit.subtitle: Practice questions, road-sign drills, and clear explanations for the Class E knowledge exam — in English and Spanish. This is educational prep, not the official exam.

ticket.title: Got a traffic ticket? Understand your options first.
ticket.subtitle: We explain the Basic Driver Improvement (BDI) path and your next steps. Eligibility and any effect on points are decided by the court or clerk — always follow the instructions you received.

reinstatement.title: Suspended license? Let's map your next steps.
reinstatement.subtitle: Suspension situations are time-sensitive. We explain the Advanced Driver Improvement (ADI) path where it applies and general first steps. Your status is determined by the state and any court orders — this is guidance, not legal advice, and no outcome is guaranteed.

mature.title: A safety refresher built for drivers 55 and older
mature.subtitle: Take an approved Mature Driver course online and get guidance on submitting completion to your insurer. Any premium discount is determined solely by your insurance company — we can't promise one.

newfl.title: New to Florida? Build your licensing checklist.
newfl.subtitle: Whether you're moving from another state or another country, we help you understand the Florida process, the documents commonly needed, and the right prep — in English and Spanish. General guidance only; always confirm current requirements with official sources.
